# Quantum Computing Inc. Announces Attendance at Upcoming Investor Conferences
**HOBOKEN, NJ – June 1, 2026** – [Quantum Computing Inc](https://www.quantumcomputinginc.com/). (“QCi” or the “Company”) (Nasdaq: QUBT), a quantum optics and integrated photonics company, today announced that management will be participating in the following investor conferences:
  * Bank of America’s Global Technology Conference on June 2-3, 2026 in San Francisco
  * Rosenblatt’s 6th Annual Technology Summit on June 9-10, 2026, attending virtually
  * Bank of America’s Transforming World Conference on June 16, 2026 in New York City
  * Benchmark’s Quantum Computing Summit on June 17, 2026 in Washington, DC
  * Northland’s Growth Conference on June 23, 2026, attending virtually
  * Please contact your sales representative to register for any of the above conferences.


## About Quantum Computing Inc.
[Quantum Computing Inc.](https://quantumcomputinginc.com/) (Nasdaq: QUBT) is a quantum optics and integrated photonics company focused on delivering accessible, scalable, and cost-effective quantum machines and photonic solutions. The Company provides foundry services for thin-film lithium niobate (“TFLN”) photonic chips and offers a vertically integrated portfolio spanning photonics components, subsystems, and full-stack systems.
Designed to operate at room-temperature with low-power requirements, QCi’s technologies enable practical deployment across high-growth markets, including high-performance computing, artificial intelligence, cybersecurity, aerospace and defense, and advanced sensing and imaging. 
Headquartered in Hoboken, New Jersey, QCi has operations in Arizona, California, Illinois, Massachusetts and Virginia. By combining advanced materials, device engineering, and scalable manufacturing, QCi delivers integrated quantum and photonics technologies, accelerating commercialization and real-world adoption.

(“QCi” or the “Company”) (Nasdaq: QUBT), a quantum optics and integrated photonics company, today announced that management will be participating in the following investor conferences:</p><ul><li><p class="MuiTypography-root MuiTypography-body1 css-1osaz8o">Bank of America’s Global Technology Conference on June 2-3, 2026 in San Francisco</p></li><li><p class="MuiTypography-root MuiTypography-body1 css-1osaz8o">Rosenblatt’s 6<sup>th</sup> Annual Technology Summit on June 9-10, 2026, attending virtually</p></li><li><p class="MuiTypography-root MuiTypography-body1 css-1osaz8o">Bank of America’s Transforming World Conference on June 16, 2026 in New York City</p></li><li><p class="MuiTypography-root MuiTypography-body1 css-1osaz8o">Benchmark’s Quantum Computing Summit on June 17, 2026 in Washington, DC</p></li><li><p class="MuiTypography-root MuiTypography-body1 css-1osaz8o">Northland’s Growth Conference on June 23, 2026, attending virtually</p></li><li><p class="MuiTypography-root MuiTypography-body1 css-1osaz8o">Please contact your sales representative to register for any of the above conferences.</p></li></ul><h2 class="MuiTypography-root MuiTypography-h2 css-rt5paw" id="about-quantum-computing-inc">About Quantum Computing Inc.</h2><p class="MuiTypography-root MuiTypography-body1 css-1osaz8o"><a href="https://quantumcomputinginc.com/">Quantum Computing Inc.</a> (Nasdaq: QUBT) is a quantum optics and integrated photonics company focused on delivering accessible, scalable, and cost-effective quantum machines and photonic solutions. The Company provides foundry services for thin-film lithium niobate (“TFLN”) photonic chips and offers a vertically integrated portfolio spanning photonics components, subsystems, and full-stack systems.</p><p class="MuiTypography-root MuiTypography-body1 css-1osaz8o">Designed to operate at room-temperature with low-power requirements, QCi’s technologies enable practical deployment across high-growth markets, including high-performance computing, artificial intelligence, cybersecurity, aerospace and defense, and advanced sensing and imaging. </p><p class="MuiTypography-root MuiTypography-body1 css-1osaz8o">Headquartered in Hoboken, New Jersey, QCi has operations in Arizona, California, Illinois, Massachusetts and Virginia. By combining advanced materials, device engineering, and scalable manufacturing, QCi delivers integrated quantum and photonics technologies, accelerating commercialization and real-world adoption.</p><h2 class="MuiTypography-root MuiTypography-h2 css-rt5paw" id="company-contact">Company Contact:</h2><p class="MuiTypography-root MuiTypography-body1 css-1osaz8o">John Nesbett/Zach Nevas</p><p class="MuiTypography-root MuiTypography-body1 css-1osaz8o">IMS Investor Relations</p><p class="MuiTypography-root MuiTypography-body1 css-1osaz8o"><a href="file:///C:/Users/rosalynchristian/IMS%20Dropbox/IMS/Quantum%20Computing,%20Inc/Press%20Releases/1Q25/investors@quantumcomputinginc.com">investors@quantumcomputinginc.com</a></p></main><div class="MuiStack-root css-1ltg9mx"><div class="MuiBox-root css-i9gxme"></div><div class="MuiBox-root css-0"><a class="MuiButtonBase-root MuiButton-root MuiButton-contained MuiButton-containedPrimary MuiButton-sizeMedium MuiButton-containedSizeMedium MuiButton-colorPrimary MuiButton-disableElevation MuiButton-root MuiButton-contained MuiButton-containedPrimary MuiButton-sizeMedium MuiButton-containedSizeMedium MuiButton-colorPrimary MuiButton-disableElevation css-12lqan9" tabindex="0" href="/news/press-releases/2026/quantum-computing-inc.-reports-first-quarter-2026-financial-results">Next page<span class="MuiButton-icon MuiButton-endIcon MuiButton-iconSizeMedium css-1g78ho2"><svg class="MuiSvgIcon-root MuiSvgIcon-fontSizeMedium css-q7mezt" focusable="false" aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M6.23 20.23 8 22l10-10L8 2 6.23 3.77 14.46 12z"></path></svg></span></a></div></div></div></div><nav class="MuiBox-root css-1cr67bo"><div class="MuiBox-root css-tub4cb"><h2>Content</h2><ul aria-label="Page table of contents" class="css-gfmjew"><li><a class="MuiBox-root css-1iygyx" href="#quantum-computing-inc-announces-attendance-at-upcoming-investor-conferences">Quantum Computing Inc.
